items.title: Continuous Control for Meta Ray-Ban Displays
items.summary: I led the algorithm development, evaluation, and product integration of two continuous control interactions for MRBD. Wrist turn is a core gesture enabling always-available volume control and contextual zoom control. Wrist move  is an advanced gesture for scrolling and cursor control. Both gestures combine EMG and IMU sensing on the Meta Neural Band.

items.title: Multimodal Interactions for AR and VR
items.summary: I led multiple projects to improve multimodal interactions across Meta Reality Labs's device portfolio. This research answered several questions about how to effectively combine eye tracking and hand gestures, EMG handwriting with released and in-development microgestures, head tracking with touchpad gestures, and more. The resulting insights and prototypes have both influenced released products and are shaping future product directions.

items.title: Next-generation EMG Continuous Control
items.summary: I work closely with EMG sensing teams at Meta to explore, influence, and evaluate next-generation continuous control schemes for AI and AR glasses. Stay tuned for future product announcements!

items.title: Mid-Air Drawing on 3D Surfaces in VR
items.summary: Defined and evaluated projection techniques that let people draw usable curves directly onto 3D geometry in VR, balancing precision, comfort, and expressivity.

items.title: SymbiosisSketch for In-Situ 3D Design
items.summary: Built a hybrid AR workflow combining tablet sketching with immersive 3D input so designers could move between rough ideation and detailed spatial edits more fluidly.

items.title: MagicalHands Gesture Authoring in VR
items.summary: Ran gesture elicitation research and built a proof-of-concept system for authoring animation in VR using mid-air hand input instead of conventional controllers.

items.title: Volumetric Michell Trusses
items.summary: Co-developed a computational fabrication pipeline for editable truss structures aligned with stress fields, bridging geometry processing, structural reasoning, and real-world exhibition work.
items.context: Research collaboration spanning graphics and fabrication

items.title: SketchSoup Design Exploration
items.summary: Built an exploratory sketch interpolation workflow that helped designers navigate alternative concepts before committing to full 3D modeling or fabrication.
